events.label: reasoning
events.text:
我们被要求根据场景判断：控制线路与电力线路在同一个线管中。根据NEC 430和制造商手册，这通常是不允许的，因为电力线会产生电磁干扰，可能影响控制信号，也可能违反NEC的分离要求。因此，这是不符合规范的。工作阶段是tested/inspected，所以发现这个缺陷，应该判定为fail。组件条件可能包括non-compliant（不符合规范）。风险可能是中等或高，取决于应用。由于是生产和装配车间，可能影响安全或设备运行，我倾向于高风险。但根据选择，risk可以是medium或high或critical。这里可能属于违规，但不一定立即产生危险，可以选high。决策fail。信心高。

输出JSON需要包含这些字段。percent_complete可能100%因为已经测试/检查阶段，但发现了问题。value可能没有。component_conditions: ["non-compliant"] 或者 “installed-defective” 也可以，但“installed-defective”表示安装有缺陷，不符合标准可以视为defective。根据选项：["installed-defective", "non-compliant", ...]，这里non-compliant更准确，但installed-defective也可用。根据说明，component condition categories that may apply: `installed-defective`，所以可能建议用这个。但场景说“control wiring in same raceway as power”，这是安装缺陷。所以用“installed-defective”。

rationale需要简短解释。references: NEC 430相关条款，如430.32或关于控制电路分离的章节？NEC 430.72(B)可能要求控制电路与电力电路分离除非有特殊条件。或者430.73？通常不允许将不同电压等级的导线放在同一线管除非所有导体绝缘等级相同且满足条件。但控制与电力混在一起会干扰并可能危险。NEC 300.3(C)可能涉及不同电压的导线在同一线管中的限制。但题目给的是NEC 430，所以可以引用430.72。所以references: ["NEC 430.72(B)"]。

action: 立即纠正措施，如将控制线与电力线分离，重新布线。

findings: "Control wiring found in same raceway as power wiring, violating separation requirements."

confidence: 0.95

event_time, rate, sound_source 等不适用可以给0或空。

order, workable 不适用给空数组。

所以最终JSON。

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "tested/inspected",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 100,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Control wiring installed in the same raceway as power wiring, which violates separation requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the circuit immediately and re-run control conductors in a separate raceway or install properly rated separation barriers per NEC.",
    "Retest all VFD and motor control functions after correction."
  ],
  "rationale": "Mixing control and power conductors in a single raceway can cause electromagnetic interference, false signaling, and violates NEC 430. Such an installation is unsafe and non-compliant.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 430.72(B)",
    "NEC 300.3(C)"
  ]
}
